title: Releasing Music article - write and refine as executing real steps
description: Article at articles/releasing-music.md is drafted (297 lines, 11 sections). Already registered in articles.json. As I go through the actual steps of releasing my music (PRO registration, MLC signup, distributor setup, etc.), update each section with real-world experience and gotchas. Design doc at docs/plans/2026-03-01-releasing-music-design.md. Implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-03-01-releasing-music-plan.md.

title: Add TRNG Deep Dive article as top article
description: Move 2026-02-20_TRNG_DEEP_DIVE.md into articles/ directory, adapt formatting for the site's custom markdown parser (no LaTeX, tables, blockquotes, or lists support), register in articles.json as the newest article, and verify it renders correctly when served locally.

title: Terminal interface as Easter egg (post-redesign)
description:
Revive the cyberpunk terminal interface as a hidden Easter egg after the main UI redesign ships. Likely route: #/terminal or ?cmd=ls.

Captured during the 2026-05-04 redesign brainstorm — user said 'we can save the terminal interface as an easter egg itself somewhere later.'

Source for the terminal code: pre-redesign index.html on main branch (~3800 lines, ~80% terminal-related). Recommend extracting to a self-contained js/terminal.js module rather than re-merging into the new split architecture.

Blocked by: the main redesign landing first.

title: Implement UI redesign per spec
description:
Implementation of the timbeach.com UI redesign per the spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-04-ui-redesign-design.md.

Scope:
- Replace terminal interface with newspaper layout (Direction B: lead + 3 secondary + dated list)
- Source Serif 4 + IBM Plex Sans, neutral palette, day/night modes
- Split single-file index.html into index.html + css/site.css + js/{app,router,article,tts,theme,starfield}.js
- Build tools/build_feed.py for RSS, wire into deploy.sh
- Restyle TTS bar to neutral palette (preserve all behavior)
- Relocate starfield+sky-info to /about page only
- Music page with TWO_ROOMS coming-soon teaser
- Backward compat: legacy #articles/<slug>.md URLs redirect to #/article/<slug>

Implementation plan to be created via writing-plans skill once user approves the spec. Branch: ui-redesign.
close_reason: Shipped to production at 1e4e392. Live at https://timbeach.com — Charter typography (Charis SIL), neutral palette day/night, RSS feed, music page lightbox, starfield on /about.

title: Create image processing skill/script for photo gallery workflow
description: Create a Claude Code skill and/or shell script that automates the photo gallery image processing workflow: auto-orient JPEGs (EXIF + manual fixes), generate thumbnails from originals (512px, quality 85), generate photos.json manifest, sync originals to VPS, deploy thumbnails. Covers the full pipeline from raw camera photos to live gallery. Should handle both timbeach.com and posixparty.com galleries.
close_reason: Created gallery-process.sh script at ~/.local/bin/ and Claude Code skill at ~/.claude/skills/gallery-process/
